title: Make Diamonds Rare Again (Rarer Diamonds)
description: Makes diamond ores rarer. Thats it.
body:
This Datapack/Mod changes minecrafts ore generation to generate diamonds not as often. The actualy size of a vein stays the same with only the rarity beeing changed. 

Feature List:
✅ Changes Ore Generation
❌ Configurable Rarity, Vein size etc.
